title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Vadodara operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions:
Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions!
